name: SFIA v8
description: Skills Framework for the Information Age v8 — representative subset of core skills

skills.name: IT Strategy and Planning
skills.description: Creating and maintaining a strategy to align IT plans with business objectives

proficiency_levels.level_description: Contributes to the development of IT strategy, ensuring alignment with business plans. Translates business strategies into operational IT plans.
Leads the development and review of IT strategy. Ensures alignment between business and IT roadmaps. Communicates strategy to senior stakeholders.
Directs the creation and governance of organizational IT strategy. Shapes policy and investment priorities across the enterprise.
Sets the strategic direction for IT across the organization. Influences board-level decisions on technology investment and digital transformation.

skills.name: Enterprise Architecture
skills.description: Aligning business strategy with technology infrastructure through architectural blueprints

proficiency_levels.level_description: Supports the creation of architectural models and blueprints. Ensures solutions conform to agreed enterprise architecture.
Develops enterprise architecture frameworks and roadmaps. Evaluates emerging technologies for strategic fit. Advises on architecture governance.
Leads enterprise architecture practice. Defines architectural principles and standards. Ensures technology investments align with the target state.

skills.name: Change Management
skills.description: Planning and managing organizational change to achieve business outcomes

proficiency_levels.level_description: Executes change management activities within a defined scope. Supports stakeholder engagement and communication plans.
Develops and implements change management plans for projects. Assesses change readiness and identifies resistance. Coaches teams through transitions.
Leads change management strategy for programmes and large initiatives. Builds organizational change capability. Measures adoption and benefits realization.
Directs organizational change management practice. Integrates change management into enterprise governance. Shapes culture transformation strategy.

skills.name: Software Design
skills.description: Specifying and designing software to meet defined requirements using agreed standards and tools

proficiency_levels.level_description: Creates simple software designs for well-defined components under guidance. Uses established design patterns and standards.
Designs software components and modules. Applies design patterns, considers non-functional requirements. Produces detailed technical specifications.
Designs complete systems or significant subsystems. Selects appropriate patterns and technologies. Reviews others' designs for quality and standards compliance.
Leads software design for complex systems. Defines design standards and best practices. Mentors designers and evaluates architectural decisions for long-term maintainability.

skills.name: Programming/Software Development
skills.description: Designing, coding, verifying, testing, documenting, amending, and refactoring programs and scripts

proficiency_levels.level_description: Writes code for simple components using established standards. Performs basic debugging and unit testing under supervision.
Develops moderately complex software components independently. Writes clean, testable code. Performs code reviews and contributes to development standards.
Develops complex software systems. Leads technical implementation of features. Establishes coding standards, mentors junior developers, and ensures code quality across the team.
Sets development strategy and technical direction. Evaluates and introduces new technologies and practices. Ensures engineering excellence across multiple teams.

skills.name: Systems Integration and Build
skills.description: Planning, implementing, and controlling activities to integrate and build system components

proficiency_levels.level_description: Performs routine integration tasks using established tools and processes. Follows build procedures and documents results.
Designs and implements integration solutions for defined system components. Configures build pipelines and resolves integration issues.
Leads integration strategy for complex systems. Designs CI/CD pipelines. Ensures integration testing coverage and manages cross-team dependencies.
Defines enterprise integration strategy and standards. Evaluates integration platforms and approaches. Governs integration practices across the organization.

skills.name: Testing
skills.description: Planning, designing, managing, executing, and reporting tests using appropriate testing tools and techniques

proficiency_levels.level_description: Executes scripted test cases. Records results and defects. Follows established test procedures under close supervision.
Designs test cases for defined requirements. Performs functional testing and identifies defects. Assists in test planning activities.
Designs and executes test plans for systems and components. Applies testing techniques including boundary analysis and equivalence partitioning. Performs non-functional testing.
Leads test strategy for projects. Designs test automation frameworks. Manages testing across multiple teams and ensures adequate coverage for releases.
Defines organizational testing strategy and standards. Introduces testing innovations. Ensures quality assurance practices are embedded across the development lifecycle.

skills.name: Incident Management
skills.description: Coordinating responses to reported service incidents, minimizing impact and restoring service

proficiency_levels.level_description: Follows established incident management procedures. Logs and categorizes incidents. Escalates unresolved issues according to defined criteria.
Manages the lifecycle of incidents. Coordinates resolution activities and communicates with affected users. Identifies patterns and contributes to problem management.
Leads major incident management. Coordinates cross-team response, manages executive communication, and drives post-incident reviews. Improves incident processes.
Defines incident management strategy and governance. Establishes SLAs and escalation frameworks. Ensures organizational readiness for major incidents.

skills.name: Problem Management
skills.description: Managing the lifecycle of problems to prevent incidents and minimize impact of unavoidable incidents

proficiency_levels.level_description: Investigates assigned problems using root cause analysis techniques. Documents known errors and workarounds. Coordinates resolution activities.
Leads problem management for complex or cross-system issues. Identifies systemic patterns. Drives permanent fixes and validates their effectiveness.
Defines problem management strategy. Integrates problem management with incident, change, and knowledge management. Measures and reports on problem trends.

skills.name: Database Administration
skills.description: Installing, configuring, monitoring, maintaining, and improving the performance of databases

proficiency_levels.level_description: Performs routine database maintenance tasks. Executes backups and monitors alerts under supervision. Follows established operational procedures.
Administers databases across environments. Performs performance tuning, manages access controls, and implements backup/recovery procedures independently.
Designs database architectures for complex systems. Leads database platform selection. Implements high availability and disaster recovery solutions. Mentors junior DBAs.
Sets database strategy and standards across the enterprise. Evaluates emerging database technologies. Ensures data platform capabilities meet current and future business needs.

skills.name: Performance Management
skills.description: Improving organizational performance by developing the performance of individuals and workgroups

proficiency_levels.level_description: Manages performance of individuals and teams against agreed objectives. Provides regular feedback. Identifies development needs and implements improvement plans.
Designs performance management frameworks and processes. Coaches managers in effective performance management. Aligns individual objectives with organizational strategy.
Shapes organizational performance management culture and strategy. Ensures performance systems drive the right behaviors and outcomes at enterprise scale.

skills.name: Learning and Development Management
skills.description: Providing learning and development processes to develop the skills needed by the organization

proficiency_levels.level_description: Designs and delivers learning programmes for defined skill areas. Evaluates training effectiveness. Maintains learning content and resources.
Manages L&D programmes across teams or departments. Identifies organizational skill gaps. Commissions or creates targeted learning interventions.
Leads organizational L&D strategy. Builds learning culture. Ensures L&D investments align with workforce planning and business strategy.

skills.name: Stakeholder Relationship Management
skills.description: Influencing stakeholder attitudes, decisions, and actions for mutual benefit

proficiency_levels.level_description: Manages relationships with defined stakeholder groups. Identifies their needs and concerns. Ensures regular communication and feedback channels.
Builds strategic relationships with key stakeholders. Manages expectations across multiple stakeholder groups. Negotiates agreements and resolves conflicts.
Leads stakeholder management strategy for major programmes or organizational change. Influences senior stakeholders. Builds trust at executive level.
Shapes the organization's approach to stakeholder engagement. Manages relationships at board and executive level. Represents the organization externally.

skills.name: Information Security
skills.description: Selecting, designing, justifying, implementing, and operating controls to maintain the security, confidentiality, and integrity of information

proficiency_levels.level_description: Applies basic security controls and procedures. Monitors for security events. Follows security policies and reports potential incidents.
Implements security controls for systems and data. Conducts vulnerability assessments. Responds to security incidents following established procedures.
Designs security architectures and control frameworks. Leads security assessments and penetration testing programmes. Develops security policies and standards.
Defines organizational information security strategy. Governs security risk management. Ensures compliance with regulations and industry standards. Reports to senior leadership on security posture.

skills.name: Data Management
skills.description: Managing practices for the governance, protection, and exploitation of data assets

proficiency_levels.level_description: Performs routine data management tasks. Maintains data quality through validation checks. Follows data governance procedures.
Implements data management processes across defined domains. Designs data models. Ensures data quality and integrity standards are met.
Leads data management for organizational domains. Designs data governance frameworks. Implements data lifecycle management and quality assurance programmes.
Defines enterprise data management strategy. Governs data assets across the organization. Ensures regulatory compliance for data protection and privacy.

skills.name: Data Analysis and Statistics
skills.description: Applying statistical and analytical techniques to data to deliver insights and support decision-making

proficiency_levels.level_description: Performs basic data analysis using standard tools and techniques. Creates simple reports and visualizations. Cleans and prepares data under guidance.
Applies statistical techniques to analyse complex datasets. Builds analytical models. Communicates insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
Leads analytical projects. Selects appropriate statistical methods and modelling techniques. Designs analytical frameworks. Mentors analysts and ensures quality of insights.
Defines organizational analytics strategy. Evaluates and introduces advanced analytical capabilities. Ensures analytics outputs drive business decisions at executive level.

role_profiles.name: Software Engineer
role_profiles.purpose: Designs, builds, and maintains software systems that meet business requirements

role_profiles.name: Data Engineer
role_profiles.purpose: Designs and maintains data pipelines, storage, and infrastructure for analytics and operations

role_profiles.name: IT Security Analyst
role_profiles.purpose: Protects organizational information assets by implementing and monitoring security controls

role_profiles.name: Enterprise Architect
role_profiles.purpose: Defines and governs enterprise technology strategy and architectural standards

role_profiles.name: Engineering Manager
role_profiles.purpose: Leads engineering teams, manages performance, and ensures delivery of quality software
